# Security policy

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in Jint — for example, a way for an
untrusted script to escape engine execution constraints, access the host process beyond the
configured CLR interop surface, or crash the runtime — please report it privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/sebastienros/jint/security/advisories/new).

Do not open a public issue, pull request, or discussion describing the vulnerability.

We will acknowledge receipt within a reasonable time and coordinate a fix and disclosure
timeline.
